title: Kerala Election Results 2026 LIVE: UDF wave sweeps Kerala; BJP wins 3 seats; CPI(M) says will 'make corrections'
content: Congress-led United Democratic Front has the last laugh in 2026 Kerala Assembly polls with a historic win as CPI(M)-led LDF falters. BJP secures Nemom, Kazhakuttam and Chathannoor seats

title: Rajnath Singh pushes for edge in high-tech warfare edge at defence symposium
content: The Defence Minister stresses that future warfare will be shaped by rapid technological transformation and the element of surprise. He points out unconventional threats, including weaponisation of everyday technologies as seen in recent attacks in West Asia

title: Tamil Nadu election results 2026 LIVE: PM Modi congratulates TVK for poll performance
content: Results declared in Gobichettipalayam, Gudalur, Valparai, Melur, Coonoor, Dharmapuri, Anna Nagar so far

title: Chiranjeevi, Mahesh Babu, Nani, Vijay Deverakonda react to actor Vijay TVK win in Tamil Nadu poll
content: Chiranjeevi, Mahesh Babu, Nani, Vijay Deverakonda, Kajal Aggarwal, Ravi Teja and others post on X as the TVK leads in over 108 seats in the Tamil Nadu Assembly election

title: Puducherry election results 2026 LIVE: Ruling AINRC leads the race; CM Rangasamy secures comfortable majority in Thattanchavady
content: Businessman Jose Charles Martin, founder of LJK, has pulled off a victory in Kamaraj Nagar, Puducherry. Previously, the seat was held by BJP. Mr. Martin found the LJK late 2025. He won with a whopping margin of 10205 votes

title: West Bengal election results LIVE: PM Modi congratulates people of State for 'spectacular mandate' as BJP surges ahead
content: Not only has the BJP been able to hold its strongholds of north Bengal and southwest Bengal but made significant inroads in erstwhile Trinamool bastions of Kolkata and adjoining district.

title: TVK’s Sengottaiyan wins Gobichettipalayam seat by margin of 16,620 votes
content: With this victory, Mr. Sengottaiyan has been elected to the Assembly from the constituency for the ninth time

title: Kerala Assembly polls | V. D. Satheesan: Captaining a resurgent Congress in Kerala
content: UDF’s emphatic win in the Kerala Assembly polls has not only silenced Satheesan’s critics, but reasserted the political supremacy of the Congress leader, who was given the task of reinvigorating the party and its disenchanted workers after he was chosen as the Leader of the Opposition following UDF’s electoral debacle in 2021

title: Kerala Assembly Polls 2026: Shanimol Usman wrests Aroor, P. Prasad strengthens hold on Cherthala
content: Ms. Usman defeats CPI(M)’s sitting MLA Daleema by a margin of 9,324 votes; Mr. Prasad, CPI’s incumbent Minister, wins by a margin of 14,489 votes against K.R. Rajendra Prasad

title: West Bengal election results: full list of winners
content: The elections were held under the shadow of the SIR exercise, in which the names of around 91 lakh people were removed from the electoral rolls, which shrank to around 6.82 crore.

title: Karnataka bypolls results 2026: Congress retains Bagalkot and Davangere South Assembly constituencies
content: Umesh Meti won Bagalkot seat by a margin of 22,332 votes, while Samarth Mallikarjun won Davangere South seat by a difference of 5,708 votes, the Election Commission said.

title: Suvendu Adhikari edges ahead in Nandigram; Mamata Banerjee leads in Bhabanipur
content: The latest round of counting by ECI has indicated Banerjee leading from Bhabanipur seat by over 5,000 votes, while Adhikari is ahead by over 3,000 votes in Nandigram

title: DMK’s fortress of Chennai breached like never before
content: The DMK’s downfall in Chennai is drastic compared to the previous election in 2021, in which the alliance it led not only won all the 16 constituencies in the district.

title: Outgoing Indian envoy meets Bangladesh FM, discusses bilateral ties
content: Mr. Verma reaffirmed India’s commitment to work closely with the people and government of Bangladesh to further strengthen people-centric cooperation across all sectors.

title: Assam election results 2026: Major Opposition leaders trailing in early trends
content: Congress leader Saikia was trailing by 4,967 votes in Sivasagar district's Nazira seat. BJP’s Mayur Borgohain secured 11,607 votes after the second round, compared to Saikia’s 6,640

title: BJP wins three seats in Kerala Assembly polls
content: State BJP chief Rajeev Chandrasekhar said "this was an anti-CPI(M) election" as the people were "fed up with their corruption and alleged misappropriation of gold from Sabarimala"

title: Kerala Assembly poll results: UDF reclaims Thrikkarippur seat after six decades as Sandeep Varier wins
content: Varier maintained a clear lead from the initial rounds of counting and steadily widened the margin through successive rounds, signalling a strong anti-incumbency wave

title: BJP’s electoral victory in West Bengal also a huge ideological success
content: The elections brought an end to Trinamool Congress’s run in power from 2011 to 2026; the BJP, which built its campaign on religious polarisation, was able to sell a dream of industrialisation and providing jobs to the electorate

title: Tamil Nadu election results: Udhayanidhi Stalin wins; may lead DMK in Assembly
content: D. Selvam, who lost the seat to Mr. Udhayanidhi, is a former Congressman, who joined the TVK before the run-up to Assembly polls

title: Tamil Nadu election results 2026: full list of winners
content: Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK), led by actor Joseph C. Vijay, has emerged as the single largest party in the 2026 Assembly elections.

title: Vijay’s TVK disrupts Dravidian bipolar politics
content: Actor-turned-politician Vijay (C. Joseph Vijay), leading his two-year-old party, Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK), surged ahead with early leads in over 100 of the State’s 234 Assembly constituencies.

title: Andhra Pradesh sanctions ₹369.20 crore for modernisation of Guntur channel
content: Project to stabilise irrigation for over 33,000 acres across 33 villages in the Krishna delta, benefiting more than four lakh people; works to cover main canal and distributaries from 0 to 47 km

title: Supreme Court seeks report from Karnataka govt on actor Darshan's plea alleging lack of basic amenities in prison
content: Senior advocate Mukul Rohatgi, appearing for Mr. Darshan, submitted that the actor is being denied the basic amenities because the court had made an observation that no five-star treatment should be given to him in jail

title: TN elections 2026: Sivakarthikeyan, Vikram, Nani, and others wish Vijay as TVK leads
content: Tamil superstar Vijay and his political party, Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK), are celebrating a historic lead in the Tamil Nadu Assembly elections, sparking a wave of congratulatory messages from prominent figures in the film industry, including actors Sivakarthikeyan, Vikram, Nani, Tiger Shroff, and Kajal Aggarwal

title: Several AIADMK leaders ahead in individual battles despite party-wide slump in Tamil Nadu
content: As of 3.45 p.m. on Monday (May 4), the AIADMK was ahead in 47 constituencies; the Pattali Makkal Katchi (PMK) in four constituencies; the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) in three; and the Amma Makkal Munnetra Kazhagam (AMMK) in one

title: Supreme Court asks Dubai-based Indian to approach embassy over travel ban
content: “We have heard the petitioner in person. We are not inclined to accept the story as stated here. Let him approach the embassy,” the bench ordered.

title: Rural sweep and urban gains set the BJP up for a decisive majority in West Bengal | Data
content: With decisive support in reserved constituencies, massive gains in rural areas and a fractured support for the Trinamool in seats with a strong Muslim presence, the BJP flips the script in West Bengal.

title: West Bengal elections 2026: How have the turncoats fared?
content: Of the seven TMC leaders who joined BJP in the past two years, only two were fielded by the saffron party

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026 results: UDF sweeps Wayanad; Minister O.R. Kelu suffers defeat
content: Kelu, CPI(M) leader and Minister in the outgoing Cabinet, lost to Congress candidate Usha Vijayan by a margin of 10,543 votes

title: West Bengal election 2026: CPI(M)-led Left Front, its ally AISF lead in one seat each
content: A lone bright spot for the Left was Domkal in Murshidabad, where CPI(M) candidate Md. Mostafijur Rahaman was leading by 8,877 votes after five rounds of counting

title: Assam Assembly election results 2026: BJP wins three seats, leads in 78
content: The BJP is aiming for a third consecutive term in Assam, while the Congress is attempting a comeback after a decade out of power

title: Konandur Lingappa, K.V. Akshara, Prof. Ranganath to receive honorary doctorates from Kuvempu University
content: Karnataka’s Governor Thaawarchand Gehlot, who is the Chancellor of the university, has approved the names for the honorary doctorates

title: Supreme Court brings survivors of forcible acid ingestion under Rights of Persons with Disabilities Act
content: The 2016 Act recognised only victims of acid-throwing, and not forcible acid ingestion; the order is operative retrospectively from the inception of the Act; it aids victims of forcible acid ingestion to claim disability benefits

title: Andhra Pradesh sends 37 teachers to Singapore for training; 29 more to follow in Finland
content: State Best Teacher awardees attending five-day programme on global teaching practices at NIE Singapore until May 8; another 29 to be sent to the University of Turku in Finland in the second phase

title: Koridang bypoll results: BJP’s Daochier I. Imchen wins by 3,123 votes
content: The bypoll, necessitated by the demise of sitting BJP MLA Imkong L. Imchen in November last year, witnessed a strong voter turnout of 82.21% on April 9

title: Assam Assembly results: State Congress chief Gaurav Gogoi loses in Jorhat
content: Gaurav Gogoi, the sitting MP of Jorhat, polled 46,257 votes, while Mr. Goswami secured 69,439 votes, retaining the seat for a third consecutive term

title: Development of RRR northern section to be taken up in two separate packages
content: Finance Ministry’s Public Private Partnership Appraisal Committee recommends HAM model with concession period of 18 years

title: Delhi court stays FIR against Abhijit Iyer Mitra over derogatory posts on women journalists
content: Additional Sessions Judge Purushottam Pathak was hearing a plea moved by Mr. Mitra seeking a stay on a magistrate order dated April 23, which directed the filing of an FIR against him

title: Assembly polls results: ‘INDI alliance’ has no future, says BJP
content: The party also hit out at Congress leader Rahul Gandhi, saying he has failed to effectively steer the alliance and is again absent on the counting day

title: Tamil Nadu election results: TVK ahead in four of seven Assembly seats in Virudhunagar district
content: While the two national parties, the BJP and CPI, were leading in one seat each, the ruling DMK was leading in the third Assembly segment

title: Maharashtra bypoll results: Sunetra Pawar takes decisive lead in Baramati; BJP’s Akshay Kardile ahead in Rahuri
content: Sunetra Pawar, who heads the NCP, bagged more than 1.5 lakh votes at the end of the 17th round of counting, taking a decisive lead over her 22 rivals

title: Andhra Pradesh lorry owners urge Centre to drop plan to raise petrol, diesel prices
content: AP Lorry Owners Association general secretary Y.V. Eswara Rao says transport sector already under strain from existing fuel prices; warns of higher transport costs and inflation if hike goes through

title: Kerala election results 2026: KPCC headquarters erupts in joy as UDF leads
content: As the counting entered the third round, the mood at the Congress headquarters turned jubilant, with party workers kickstarting celebrations by distributing sweets

title: Kurnool civic chief warns of fines, licence cancellation over poor sanitation
content: Commissioner Challa Obulesu warns of fines and cancellation of trade licences for shops that fail to keep dust bins; orders cleanup at Vinayak Ghat after inspection

title: IUML credits UDF’s teamwork for Assembly polls victory in Kerala
content: The Indian Union Muslim League (IUML) is leading in 23 of the 27 seats it contested in the Assembly polls

title: Tamil Nadu shocker: 5 factors that powered TVK Vijay's political blockbuster
content: Actor-turned-politician Thalapathy Vijay's TVK has emerged as the single largest party in Tamil Nadu assembly polls, dramatically altering the state's political landscape. Leveraging star power and organized fan networks, TVK has disrupted the decades-long dominance of the DMK and AIADMK, resonating with voters seeking an alternative.

title: TVK storms Tamil Nadu but falls short of majority: Who will Vijay ally with?
content: Mega movie star "Thalapathy" Vijay's party, Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK), has emerged as a significant force in Tamil Nadu politics, disrupting the DMK and AIADMK's dominance. While TVK secured triple-digit leads in early trends, it fell short of a majority, prompting debate on structural shifts versus celebrity appeal and raising questions about Vijay's solo political path.

title: Kerala Election Results 2026: Full list of winners and losers; Congress-led UDF set for comeback
content: Early trends for the 2026 Kerala Assembly elections show a significant shift, with the Congress-led UDF projected for a commanding victory, leading in over 100 seats. The ruling LDF faces strong anti-incumbency, while the BJP remains a marginal player. This outcome suggests a return to Kerala's traditional pattern of alternating governments.

title: As many say software is dead, Amazon Web Services CEO calls it a 'huge business opportunity’
content: AWS CEO Matt Garman views the AI-driven 'SaaSpocalypse' as a major business opportunity, not a threat.  He highlighted the rise of agentic AI reshaping work and announced new AI-powered tools like the Quick desktop app, aiming to revolutionize personal productivity.  AWS is also deepening its OpenAI partnership, integrating advanced AI models into its cloud services to meet surging demand.

title: Dhamne takes 'confidence' from first ATP Challenger final run
content: Manas Dhamne finished runner-up in his first-ever ATP Challenger final in Shymkent, Kazakhstan. The 18-year-old has had two quarter-final runs at this level this year while clinching an M15 title and playing the qualifying rounds of two Masters tournaments. His progress has many parties, chief, perhaps, is his own mature head.

title: BJP winners list in West Bengal Election 2026: Full constituency-wise results
content: In a historic electoral upset, the BJP has secured its first-ever assembly election victory in West Bengal, unseating Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee after 15 years. The results, reflecting a record 92.47% voter turnout, saw the BJP's "Bhoy out, Bharosa in" slogan resonate strongly, surpassing the TMC's "Maa maati manush" narrative.

title: Rohit Sharma’s heartfelt gesture steals show after accidental hit on ground staff
content: During a Mumbai Indians training session, Rohit Sharma paused his practice to check on a ground staff member hit by a ball. He ensured the injured staffer received an ice pack and medicine, showcasing his compassionate nature. This incident occurred as MI faces playoff pressure with Rohit's return from injury uncertain.

title: Assembly election results 2026: Top 10 winners and losers
content: The 2026 assembly elections have dramatically reshaped India's political landscape. Vijay's debut in Tamil Nadu, the BJP's gains in West Bengal and Kerala's return to rotation mark significant shifts. Established powers face challenges as new forces emerge, redefining narratives and pushing others to the margins. This analysis highlights the key winners and losers.

title: ‘I’ll send a private plane!’: Mark Wood amused by bizarre IPL offer during illness
content: Mark Wood recounted a bizarre IPL offer: a franchise owner proposed a private jet flight for a match despite Wood being seriously ill.  The owner insisted on Wood playing, even suggesting a quick flight out and back.  Wood, though tempted by the novelty, ultimately declined, prioritizing his health over the surreal proposition.

title: 'No need to be afraid': Mamata to TMC counting agents; assures 'win after sunset'
content: Directing the party candidates and counting agents not to leave the couting centre, Mamata said her party would win after the sunset and that there is "no need for anyone to be afraid". Mamata, who is seeking the fourth strait term, alleged a foul play by the Election Commission, and claimed that there's a BJP's ​plan to show themselves ahead first.

title: RG Kar victim’s mother, BJP candidate Ratna Debnath leads from Panihati
content: In a closely watched West Bengal election, RG Kar rape victim’s mother and BJP candidate Ratna Debnath is currently leading in Panihati.  She is campaigning on women's safety and her daughter's memory against TMC's Tirthankar Ghosh.  Nationally, BJP leads on 121 seats, TMC on 71, with high voter turnout recorded.

title: IPL 2026: Bad news for CSK! MS Dhoni skips Delhi trip as injury delays return
content: Chennai Super Kings face a significant blow as MS Dhoni misses their IPL 2026 clash against Delhi Capitals on Tuesday due to delay in injury recovery. He remains in Chennai for rehabilitation, raising concerns about his availability. This absence impacts CSK's playoff aspirations as they navigate a crucial phase of the tournament.

title: PSL: Babar Azam's Rohit Sharma-inspired 'walk' celebration goes wrong
content: Babar Azam captained Peshawar Zalmi to their second PSL title, defeating Hyderabad Kingsmen by five wickets. A light-hearted attempt to recreate Rohit Sharma's iconic walk during celebrations became a viral meme. All-rounder Aaron Hardie was the star, excelling with both bat and ball in the final.

title: 'They cheated people': Humayun Kabir congratulates West Bengal for defeating TMC
content: West Bengal's assembly election results reveal widespread public anger against the Trinamool Congress, according to AUJP founder Humayun Kabir. He accused the ruling party of extensive corruption, surpassing even British-era exploitation.  Kabir, a former TMC leader, expressed confidence in winning his seats, as early trends indicated a significant shift in power.

title: ‘Watching Virat, you understand the art of batting’: RCB star on Kohli’s impact
content: Jacob Bethell is making the most of his IPL 2026 opportunity with Royal Challengers Bengaluru. He is learning from Virat Kohli and other senior players. Bethell's role has increased due to Phil Salt's absence. He is adapting to the high tempo of the league. Bethell's development could be crucial for RCB's playoff push.

title: West Bengal Assembly Election Results 2026: The colour changes, the argument remains
content: The BJP, which had won 77 seats and 38.15% vote share in 2021, is now showing a dramatic surge in counting trends. By noon, several live trackers had the BJP crossing or approaching the halfway mark, with leads in the 140–150 range and vote share estimates hovering around 46–48%, while the TMC trailed significantly behind.

title: Bengal results: BJP makes gains in TMC strongholds, including Muslim belts; leads in over 80 seats
content: Early West Bengal election results indicate the Bharatiya Janata Party is making significant inroads in Muslim-majority constituencies.  This suggests a shift in voter allegiance.  The Trinamool Congress faces challenges converting votes despite secularism campaigns.  Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee urges party workers to remain steadfast, asserting the TMC is still ahead.  High voter turnout was recorded across phases.

title: IPL 2026: Phil Salt returns home mid-season for scans, RCB face anxious wait
content: England opener Phil Salt has returned home for scans on a finger injury sustained during an IPL 2026 match, casting doubt on his immediate availability for Royal Challengers Bengaluru. Salt, who had been in impressive form, is hopeful of a swift recovery and a return later this month as RCB push for the playoffs.

title: Vijay for beginners: The cinema star who could become Tamil Nadu's 'Thalapathy'
content: And today, one of the starkest outliers in the early trends is the performance of Vijay’s TVK. But who is Vijay, who, if trends hold, could become the new Thalapathy of Tamil Nadu politics?

title: GT IPL 2026 playoff scenarios: Gujarat Titans back in the mix with 3 straight wins
content: Gujarat Titans secured a thrilling four-wicket victory over Punjab Kings, marking their third consecutive win and reigniting playoff hopes. Sai Sudharsan's steady fifty and Washington Sundar's crucial late hitting guided them home. Despite the wins, a negative Net Run Rate and tough upcoming fixtures mean Gujarat must secure at least two more victories to guarantee qualification.

title: "Tribute To Ajit Pawar": Sunetra Pawar On Historic Win In Baramati Bypoll Win
content: Sunetra Pawar also thanked the family's patriarch and NCP (SP) chief Sharad Pawar and Baramati MP Supriya Sule for their support.

title: Opinion: Opinion | The 'Silent' Bengal Voter Was Always Keeping Score. Mamata Just Didn't See It
content: Bengal is not an easy audience. So if the saffron wave has broken in here, the deepest explanation is this: people did not vote only for a party. They voted for a different emotional contract.

title: How Congress Engineered Its Comeback In Kerala
content: In Kerala, the Pinarayi Vijayan administration was buckling under the weight of incumbency. All the Congress had to do was avoid any blunders.

title: US Military Says No Navy Ships Have Been Hit In Strait Of Hormuz
content: US forces are supporting Project Freedom and enforcing the naval blockade on Iranian ports," US Central Command said in a post on X.

title: Election Results Live Updates: BJP 200 Paar In Bengal, Vijay Delivers Tamil Nadu Blockbuster
content: Election Results 2026 LIVE Updates: Exit polls predict a close competition between Trinamool Congress and BJP in West Bengal

title: MK Stalin Loses Kolathur Stronghold To TVK's VS Babu
content: Tamil Nadu assembly election results: MK Stalin, who is seeking a second straight term, is trailing VS Babu from the Kolathur assembly seat.

title: WHO Says Risk To Public Is Low After Hantavirus Cases In Atlantic Ship
content: The cruise left Argentina about three weeks ago with around 150 passengers and stopped in the Antarctic and other places on its way to Cape Verde.

title: "Bhaya Se Bharosa Transition Happening Now": Minister On BJP's Bengal Result
content: Long considered 'Mission Impossible' for the BJP, the Bengal results are a big boost to the ruling party at the Centre and an eye-opener for the Trinamool.

title: Canada, Europe Not Destined To Submit To "Brutal" New World Order Says Carney
content: Canadian Prime Mark Carney is the first non-European leader to attend a meeting of the European Political Community.

title: Father's Pride, Festive Mood: As Vijay Surges, Celebration Erupts At Home
content: Reflecting on Vijay's political evolution, Chandrasekhar revealed that this moment was years in the making.

title: "Weakest Congress Leader": BJP's Attack On Gaurav Gogoi After Loss In Assam
content: Gaurav Gogoi - the son of former Assam chief minister Tarun Gogoi - lost from the Jorhat seat to BJP's Hitendra Nath Goswami.

title: 'Bengal Will Get Its Brand Back': Harsh Goenka On BJP's Historic Victory
content: He hoped that if the BJP forms the government in the state, the focus would be on economic and industrial development.

title: Puducherry Election Results 2026 LIVE Updates: NDA Set To Return In Puducherry, Chief Minister Rangasamy Leads From Thattanchavady
content: Puducherry Assembly Election Results 2026 LIVE Updates: A record voter turnout of 89.87% was reported, marking the highest participation ever in the Union Territory since its merger with India in 1964.

title: Tamil Nadu Election Results 2026 LIVE Updates: Vijay's TVK Ahead In Over 100 Seats, MK Stalin Loses Stronghold
content: Tamil Nadu Assembly Election Results 2026 LIVE Updates: While most exit polls have predicted DMK's second straight win, one suggested a huge wave of the "Vijay effect" in the state this time.
